chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1845 of 2025 Shakil Aftab Kashmirwala Versus Karachi Cantonment Board Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of Misc. 9153/25 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 08.09.2025 Ms. Zahrah Sehr Vayani, advocate for petitioner. Ms. Shazia Hinjrah, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Usman Tufail Shaikh, advocate for respondent. -.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner has filed a statement stating therein that petitioner has made 100% payment to respondents and hence this petition has become infructuous. The statement is taken on record. Petition is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge
